overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural landscape at sunset with a dramatic red sky, approaching and entering a stone tunnel structure. The scene transitions from open countryside to an enclosed torchlit passageway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural countryside path at sunset

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the dirt path through open fields with two swords on his back, heading toward distant mountains

entered.detail: silhouetted castle or large stone structure on the horizon against the red sunset sky
distant mountain silhouettes forming the backdrop under the dramatic red sky
wooden post with burning flame providing warm orange light along the path
low stacked stone wall lining the right side of the dirt path
dense dark line of trees on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through open countryside at sunset, with a dramatic crimson sky overhead. Distant mountains and a castle silhouette are visible ahead, while stone walls and torch posts line the dirt path through grassy fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts approaching historic stone bridge

events.description: passing a tall red wooden shrine or marker post on the right side of the path
large multi-arched stone bridge structure comes into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking toward the village, passing by the wooden shrine and approaching the stone bridge where villagers are present

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the wooden shrine post looking toward the path

entered.detail: tall red wooden ceremonial post with decorative roof structure
large historic stone bridge with multiple rounded arches spanning the path
stone building with lit windows attached to the bridge structure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the village outskirts as Geralt passes a wooden shrine marker. A large stone bridge with multiple arches dominates the right side, with villagers visible near the structure. The open landscape gives way to built environment as the camera approaches the tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone tunnel with storage barrels and warm torchlight

events.description: entering the dark stone archway tunnel from the outdoor sunset environment into torchlit interior
character slows down and turns around to face back toward the tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks into the torchlit tunnel, passes a villager walking out, then turns around near the interior storage area

notable_agents.action: villager woman in dress walking toward the tunnel exit

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone brick walls forming the left side of the tunnel enclosure
rough-hewn stone brick walls with wooden support beams on the right
stacked wooden storage barrels with metal bands lining the tunnel walls
wall-mounted iron sconces with burning torches providing warm orange illumination
tall wooden shelving units holding pottery jars and storage containers

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the dark stone tunnel, transitioning from the red sunset to warm artificial torchlight. The enclosed space features stacked wooden barrels and stone walls. After passing a villager walking out, Geralt turns around near the tunnel interior, with the exit archway framing the purple sky behind him.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive rural landscape under a crimson sunset into the enclosed confines of a torchlit stone tunnel. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path through grassy fields, where the dramatic red sky frames distant mountains and a castle silhouette. As the camera advances toward the village outskirts, the open terrain gives way to a built environment, passing a wooden shrine and a large arched stone bridge populated by villagers. The scene then shifts from the natural light of the sunset to the warm glow of artificial torches as Geralt enters the dark tunnel, moving past stacked wooden barrels and a passing villager. Finally, the camera turns within the stone interior, framing the exit archway against a fading purple sky.
